properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My lips shall praise Thee Thus will I bless Thee I will lift up my hands Unto Thy name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Thy loving kindness Is better than life Thy loving kindness Is better than life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I lift my hands Lord Unto Thy name I lift my hands Lord Unto Thy name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Rememb'ring Thee Lord I'm satisfied Rememb'ring Thee Lord I'm satisfied

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Safe in Thy Shadow I will rejoice Safe in Thy shadow I will rejoice
